prestazioni: MR16DDT (1.6L Direct Injection Turbo) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (846717-5) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (Cobb Tuning) and a Tomei 260° camshaft set (MIVEC-compatible) for optimized spool and top-end power, targeting 320whp on E85 fuel with a Cobb Accessport V3 (Stage 2+ map).

MR16DDT-specific fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PN: 20-0119) and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F90000267) to support the increased airflow and prevent fuel starvation under boost.

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain: Cusco Type-RS 2-way LSD (1.5-way preload) for the QR25DE-based transaxle (RS model-specific), paired with a PRL Motorsports short shifter (PN: PRL-JUKE-SS) and a set of SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms: SPF1004K, rear subframe: SPF1005K) to eliminate torque steer and improve shift precision.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works JUKE RS widebody kit (LB-JUKE-RS) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3M 1080 vinyl overlay in Nissan 'Passion Red' for OEM+ finish) and extended rocker panels to accommodate the 20mm wider track from Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +15 ET, 5x114.3).

Seibon Carbon hood (JUKE-RS-SCF) with a custom 2.5-inch dual-exit exhaust (HKS Hi-Power SPEC-L, PN: 32016-AK001) routed through the rear diffuser, paired with a custom rear bumper lip (Varis Japan) for aggressive aero balance.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Nissan Juke RS-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in Alcantara (Autostyle Japan, 'Nismo Red' stitching) with a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, FIA-spec 6-point bolt-in) and a Nismo RS-specific Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) for weight reduction and driver engagement.
